productDisplayName: Doodle Girls Lace Bow LT.Pink Leggings
description: Composition Pink leggings made of 100% cotton, has a ruched hem with check bow and lace detailing Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach or iron on print Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed This doodle leggings for your little one is sure to become a wardrobe favorite, with its comfort oriented cut. The adorable little bows give this comfort clothing a cute twist. Pair it with light coloured t-shirts and cartoon themed slippers to make your toddler the cynosure of all eyes.
